messages.content: My friend, I can sense the weight of those words - "I am not priya" (beloved). It's as if you're feeling a little lost, unloved, or unappreciated. First, let me tell you that you are indeed loved, just as you are. The Gita teaches us about the inherent worth of every being, regardless of external circumstances. Remember, your true nature is untouched by life's ups and downs. Today, try to focus on your own inner worth, rather than seeking validation from others. Take a few moments to breathe, relax, and remind yourself of your own strengths and qualities. What's one thing you can do today to nurture your own sense of self-love and self-worth, dear one?
